variable_costs._description: Costs incurred per purchase order or per transfer
variable_costs._po_processing_note: Per-PO cost: customs clearance + QC inspection + receiving labor + logistics coordination (฿15,000/PO)
variable_costs._po_freight_note: Inbound freight as % of PO value (3% of goods cost)
variable_costs._transfer_local_note: Per-transfer cost for WH→Store within Bangkok (฿800: fuel + driver time + vehicle)
variable_costs._transfer_upcountry_note: Per-transfer cost for WH→Store upcountry regions (฿1,500: longer distance)
variable_costs._transfer_per_unit_note: Handling cost per unit transferred (฿2/unit: picking + packing)
